Record Class UnitStats

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
logic.structure.UnitStats
Record Components:
id - The unique internal identifier (e.g., "SWORDMAN").
preSelectedTeam - The default team assignment (ATTACKER, DEFENDER, or NEUTRAL).
name - The display name shown in the UI.
spritePath - The filename of the image asset (e.g., "warrior.png").
maxHp - The total health points of the unit.
attackPower - The base damage dealt by the unit.
moveRange - The number of tiles/stamina points available for movement.
defensePower - The flat reduction applied to incoming damage.
attackRange - How far the unit's AttackStrategy can reach.
impactRadius - The size of the Area of Effect (AoE) on impact.
moveType - The MoveStrategy defining terrain traversal rules.
attackType - The AttackStrategy defining combat patterns.
role - The classification of the unit (ROOKIE or LEADER).
isObstacle - Flag indicating if this is a physical barrier (like a mountain).
isTown - Flag indicating if this is a captureable town objective.
passiveSkills - A list of inherent abilities (like 'Berserk' or 'Fire Resistance').
public record UnitStats(String id, Team preSelectedTeam, String name, String spritePath, int maxHp, int attackPower, int moveRange, int defensePower, int attackRange, int impactRadius, MoveStrategy moveType, AttackStrategy attackType, UnitRole role, boolean isObstacle, boolean isTown, ArrayList<PassiveSkill> passiveSkills) extends Record
An immutable data container representing the base attributes and strategies of a unit. UnitStats defines the "DNA" of a unit, including its combat potential, movement capabilities, and inherent passive skills. This data is typically stored in the UnitRegistry and used as a template for unit creation.

  • Constructor Details

    • UnitStats

      public UnitStats(String id, Team preSelectedTeam, String name, String spritePath, int maxHp, int attackPower, int moveRange, int defensePower, int attackRange, int impactRadius, MoveStrategy moveType, AttackStrategy attackType, UnitRole role, boolean isObstacle, boolean isTown, ArrayList<PassiveSkill> passiveSkills)
      Creates an instance of a UnitStats record class.
      Parameters:
      id - the value for the id record component
      preSelectedTeam - the value for the preSelectedTeam record component
      name - the value for the name record component
      spritePath - the value for the spritePath record component
      maxHp - the value for the maxHp record component
      attackPower - the value for the attackPower record component
      moveRange - the value for the moveRange record component
      defensePower - the value for the defensePower record component
      attackRange - the value for the attackRange record component
      impactRadius - the value for the impactRadius record component
      moveType - the value for the moveType record component
      attackType - the value for the attackType record component
      role - the value for the role record component
      isObstacle - the value for the isObstacle record component
      isTown - the value for the isTown record component
      passiveSkills - the value for the passiveSkills record component

  • Method Details

    • spritePath

      public String spritePath()
      Dynamically resolves the full file system path for the unit's sprite. It organizes assets into subfolders based on whether the unit is an obstacle or its specific UnitRole.
      Returns:
      A string path formatted as: "images/sprites/[role]Sprites/[filename]"

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with the compare method from their corresponding wrapper classes.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
